drill: D3 — pipeline step failure / approval (abort banked f025)
step_failure_rep: inject: middle step content-get on a nonexistent doc, with a dependent step
recognize+contain: one ok:false pipeline.run envelope, exit 1 — failed step NAMED with exit code, dependent step held at 'pending', healthy step completed; f014 routing held (child stdout on stderr)
recover: corrected step target, re-run → completed 3/3, exit 0
approval_reps: denial (echo n |): contained — gated step stayed pending, ok:false envelope names 'approval denied', exit 1. STAIN: the readline prompt printed to STDOUT, prefixing the json envelope (parse fails until stripped)

stdin EOF (</dev/null): FINDING — process exits 0 MID-RUN with no envelope (event loop drains, promise never settles); run state stranded status:'running' with zero steps (zombie). Orchestrator sees success; pipeline status says still running. Double lie.
containment: pipeline abort 9f98d66c → status aborted (f025-fixed marker held)
finding: non-TTY approval gate: EOF→false-success+zombie state; prompt on stdout corrupts json. f020's lesson unlearned at this gate: non-interactive contexts need an explicit approval flag and a fail-fast structured refusal, prompt belongs on stderr.
